title: The Crucifixion
text:
Golgotha. The Place of the Skull.

No matter what you did, no matter what you said — here it is. The cross is upright. The nails were driven. The sky has grown strange, a bruised yellow-grey at midday. The crowd is thinning now, some weeping, some mocking, most simply watching in silence.

You stand at the edge of the hill. Some of the disciples are here — those who did not flee. Mary is here. A centurion stands guard.

You have pushed against prophecy harder than anyone. You warned him. You tried to stop Judas. You called out in the crowd. And yet — here you are. Here he is.

The prophecy was not a plan that could be disrupted. It was a shape the world was always moving toward. You were inside it all along.

You are the only one who knows what you tried to do.

choices.text: Kneel. Bear witness in silence. Let history record what it must.
Weep openly. You came back in time to stop this and you could not.
Speak your name aloud into the wind. Refuse to be erased from this moment.
